description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Actinic Catalog 4.7.0 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) the query string argument to certain .pl files, (2) the REFPAGE parameter to ca000007.pl, (3) PRODREF parameter to ss000007.pl, or (4) hop parameter to ca000001.pl.
